actual_run_inference: PATH-1: the run was inconclusive against this baseline.
More precision, a wider window, or a revised metric may be needed to decide.

expected_signature.expected_value: directional signal indicating one family preferred
expected_signature.pass_rule: the result decisively favors dilation over translation (or vice versa)

baseline_hypothesis.plain_statement: A translation-vs-dilation comparison should indicate which transform family is more coherent under the tested reconstruction conditions.
baseline_hypothesis.why_this_matters: Pathfinders inform which gauge direction to prioritize when allocating proof effort. A decisive PATH-1 result narrows the formalization target.

candidate_lemmas.name: Preferred Gauge-Direction Note (deferred)
candidate_lemmas.statement: This run was inconclusive against the current baseline (primary metric coherence_advantage_dilation_minus_translation: observed ≈ 0.477273). No candidate lemma is suggested until the baseline is confirmed or definitively failed.
what_it_does_not_prove: this rules out the non-preferred direction in general
